prompt: Create a vertical 9:16 anime watercolor illustration of two elegant young women in a bright rose garden or glasshouse, viewed from a low angle as if the viewer is looking up at them while they step forward. There are exactly two characters: on the left, a tall graceful woman with very long flowing silvery blue hair, a deep navy-blue rose-themed ballgown with layered translucent ruffles, a huge blue rose integrated into the skirt, blue rose hair ornaments, dangling jewelry, fingerless lace gloves, and high-heeled lace-up sandals decorated with blue flowers; her face is intentionally obscured by a soft opaque beige-gray rectangular block. On the right, a cheerful petite girl with short wavy light brown hair and golden eyes, smiling brightly with her right hand reaching toward the viewer, wearing a vivid red rose-themed dress with layered sheer petals, large red roses in the skirt, a rose crown, rose earrings, wrist corsage, ankle rose ornaments, and red high-heeled lace-up shoes. The image should emphasize exactly two oversized rose dresses, one blue and one red, with rose motifs repeated in the hair, bodices, skirts, shoes, and accessories. Surround them with climbing rose vines, scattered petals, soft white sunlight, pale cream architecture, and a dreamy floral background; include falling red and blue petals and a few roses on the floor. Use delicate Japanese anime styling, luminous watercolor washes, fine linework, romantic fantasy fashion design, airy fabric transparency, sparkling highlights, pastel cream lighting, and a celebratory Rose Day mood. No text, no logo, no border.
